Q:\repos\msbuild\src\Build.UnitTests\BackEnd\IntrinsicTask_Tests.cs:1584: // NOTE: outputs from regular tasks, like CreateItem, are gathered up and included in the project in the order (1) inferred (2) executed.

Q:\repos\msbuild\src\Framework\BuildRequestDataFlags.cs:38: /// knows that the new build request does not depend on project state generated by a previous request.  Setting
Q:\repos\msbuild\src\Framework\BuildRequestDataFlags.cs:40: /// otherwise have to serialize the project state from one node to another, which may be
